scenarios.docBefore:
# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers
scenarios.docAfter:
# Project Overview
## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

## Summary
This project aims to improve overall efficiency in project management.

scenarios.docAfter:
# Technical Spec
## Introduction
This is a technical specification document for a markdown editor, outlining its features and functionality. It is intended to serve as a reference guide for developers, editors, and anyone interested in learning more about the capabilities of this tool.
## Architecture

The system uses three layers.

scenarios.docAfter:
# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals



## Q2 Goals



## Q1 Goals: Improving Performance
* Increase processing speed by 30% through caching.
* Optimize database queries to reduce latency by 25%.
* Implement parallel processing for concurrent tasks.
## Q2 Goals: New Features
* Develop real-time analytics and reporting.
* Integrate AI-powered content suggestions.
* Enhance user authentication with biometric recognition.
